items.title: Happy offseason everyone. Why "decline and re-sign" will be the go-to move for lots of front offices this summer, and how all 42 notable player and team options -- including this for Jose Alvarado and Justin Champagnie -- will work out
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt:
Happy offseason everyone. Why "decline and re-sign" will be the go-to move for lots of front offices this summer, and how all 42 notable player and team options -- including this for Jose Alvarado and Justin Champagnie -- will work out

media.title: Predicting the NBA’s notable player options, team options and non-guarantees
media.description: Get accustomed to the phrase “decline and re-sign," because you’re going to be hearing it a lot as teams look to manage their salary caps.
